title: Venture Portfolio iQube (v1.0)
description: PREMIUM, CUMULATIVE upload schema for Venture Lab Pro/Elite. It is a strict SUPERSET of the Venture Pro schema (v1.0): everything Pro has (operator, strategy, experienceModel, experienceGuide, standing, plan, and full 13-layer ventures) PLUS multiple ventures and a portfolio block (thesis, prioritisation, cross-venture intelligence). A Pro/Elite operator downloads and maintains ONLY this one file.

_agent_briefing.audience: An off-platform AI assistant helping a Pro/Elite operator prepare a Venture Portfolio iQube.
_agent_briefing.cumulative_design: Schemas are cumulative supersets: Venture Light (v0.5) ⊂ Venture Pro (v1.0) ⊂ Venture Portfolio (this file). A portfolio operator uploads this single file — it populates ExperienceModel, ExperienceGuide, Standing, every venture's full 13-layer VentureQube, AND the portfolio-level thesis + priority order. There is no need to also upload the Light or Pro files.
_agent_briefing.ventures: Each entry in `ventures[]` uses the SAME full 13-layer VentureQube shape defined in the Venture Pro schema (ventureQube-pro-schema.json → definitions.ventureProV1): identity, thesis, intent, signalEvidence, archetypes, revenueArchitecture, commercialModel, capability, resource, execution, delegation, outcome, governance, institutional. Pro/Elite may include multiple ventures (Pro up to 3, Elite unlimited — enforced server-side).
_agent_briefing.portfolio_block: The `portfolio` block is the new, portfolio-only layer: a `thesis` that spans all ventures, an explicit `priorities` order (by venture name or slug), and free-form `notes`. Cross-venture intelligence (shared capabilities, stage spread) is DERIVED server-side from the ventures — you don't provide it.
_agent_briefing.what_to_produce: A single JSON file: the Pro base + the ventures array (full 13-layer each) + the portfolio block.

experienceGuide.description: Same as Venture Light/Pro (sphere lattice + focusIntent).

ventures.description: Each venture uses the FULL 13-layer VentureQube shape from the Venture Pro schema (definitions.ventureProV1). Multiple ventures allowed (Pro ≤3, Elite unlimited; enforced server-side).

portfolio.description: Portfolio-only layer. Cross-venture intelligence (sharedCapabilities, stageSpread) is derived server-side and is NOT provided here.

thesis.description: The throughline that ties all ventures together — why this portfolio, what it compounds toward.

priorities.description: Explicit prioritisation order, listing venture names or slugs from `ventures[]` highest-priority first.

notes.description: Prioritisation rationale, shared resources, sequencing across ventures.
